P9X_Euro4 - BF51 à BF57 - AF - v3.0

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

        "firstbyte": 9,

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4,

      },

      },

      },

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5,

        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true

        "bitoffset": 2,

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 4,

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 18
      },

        "firstbyte": 19

        "firstbyte": 20
      },

        "firstbyte": 22

        "firstbyte": 26

  {
    "minbytes": 12,
    "replybytes": "61A0",
    "sentbytes": "21A0",
    "name": "RDBLI Fuel Delivery Control 1",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "engine speed": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "final fuel delivery": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "final fuel delivery of noload max revolution": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "final fuel delivery of start": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "fuel delivery of smoke Limit under steady condition": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 18,
    "replybytes": "61A1",
    "sentbytes": "21A1",
    "name": "RDBLI Fuel Delivery Control 2",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Accelerator pedal kickdown": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "actual common rail pressure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "final pedal position": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "main delivery timing": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "pilot fuel delivery": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "pilot interval time": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "target common rail pressure": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Target EGR valve position": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Target INTAKE valve position": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Target TURBO position": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Readiness function code : Fuel system monitoring": {
        "firstbyte": 15
      },
      "Readiness function code : Comprehensive component monitoring": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Readiness function code : EGR system monitoring": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "VSS implementation flag": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "VSS switch flag 1": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "VSS switch flag 2": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 5
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 17,
    "replybytes": "61A2",
    "sentbytes": "21A2",

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "supply voltage - Pedal2 MAF": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Water temperature sensor voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "EGR origin voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      }
    }
  },

      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Intake throttle valve duty": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Manifold air temperature sensor voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 3,

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "starter switch": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vehicle speed": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Fan Control Line 3": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
  },

  {
    "minbytes": 38,
    "sentbytes": "1200041000",
    "name": "Read Freeze Frame Data",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "FFN": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "FR Accel pedal position": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "FR Air flow rate from MAF sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 15
      },
      "FR Atomosphere press.": {
        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "FR Boost press. - Actual value": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "FR Boost press. - Target value": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "FR Brake switch (normal close)": {
        "firstbyte": 35,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "FR Brake switch (normal open)": {
        "firstbyte": 35,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "FR Calculated load value": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      },
      "FR Common rail pressure - Actual value": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "FR Common rail pressure - Target value": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "FR EDU status signal level - FIJFLV": {
        "firstbyte": 33
      },
      "FR EDU status signal pattern - FIJF": {
        "firstbyte": 32
      },
      "FR EGR - Motor duty": {
        "firstbyte": 23
      },
      "FR EGR valve - Actual lift": {
        "firstbyte": 22
      },
      "FR EGR valve - Target lift": {
        "firstbyte": 21
      },
      "FR Engine speed": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "FR Final target inj. quantity": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "FR Gear position": {
        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "FR Glow controller": {
        "firstbyte": 35,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "FR Pump valve control angle": {
        "firstbyte": 34
      },
      "FR RENAULT DTC": {
        "firstbyte": 37
      },
      "FR Starter": {
        "firstbyte": 35,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "FR Temperature - Atomosphere air": {
        "firstbyte": 31
      },
      "FR Temperature - Engine coolant": {
        "firstbyte": 27
      },
      "FR Temperature - Fuel": {
        "firstbyte": 28
      },
      "FR Temperature - Intake air": {
        "firstbyte": 30
      },
      "FR Temperature - Oil": {
        "firstbyte": 29
      },
      "FR TURBO - Actual position": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "FR TURBO - Target position": {
        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "FR TURBO failure info": {
        "firstbyte": 20
      },
      "FR Vehicle speed": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "5700000000",
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Type Of Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Specific Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "replybytes": "63",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "2307000000",

    "deny_sds": [],

      "RMBA Memory address": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "RMBA Memory size": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "RMBA Values Data #": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "C1",
    "sentbytes": "81",
    "name": "SComm fast init",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Key byte 1": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Key byte 2": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "71",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310000",
    "name": "SRBLI start routine",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine entry parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Routine number": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine launched": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Routine launched status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "71",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "31000000",
    "name": "SRBLI start routine inj-stop",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine entry parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Routine number inj-stop": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Test type": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine launched": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Routine launched status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "72",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "320000",
    "name": "SRBLI stop routine",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "routine number to stop": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Routine output parameter stop": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine stopped": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Routine stopped status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Session Name": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "replybytes": "C2",
    "sentbytes": "82",
    "name": "StopComm",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7BDA",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3BDA000000000000000000000000",
    "name": "WDBLI QR Data / injector #1",
    "deny_sds": [],

  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7B",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B8100000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "name": "WDBLI VIN write",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "VINwrite": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "71",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "31000000",
    "name": "SRBLI start routine test SCV",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine entry parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Routine number test SCV": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Test type SCV": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine launched": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Routine launched status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },

    "manualsend": true,
